name: Cedo
description: Launch a glaive that ricochets off surfaces in bursts of elemental damage, then perforate enemies with primary fire’s precision buck-shot. Damage increases with each Status Effect afflicting a target. Lavos will transmute a small portion of any ammo pickup to Primary Ammo when wielding his signature Cedo.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Launch a glaive that ricochets off surfaces in bursts of elemental damage, then perforate enemies with primary fire’s precision buck-shot. Damage increases with each Status Effect afflicting a target. Lavos will transmute a small portion of any ammo pickup to Primary Ammo when wielding his signature Cedo.

components.name: Forma
components.description: This shape-altering component is fundamental to Orokin construction. Allows you to change the polarity of a mod slot on a Warframe, Companions or Weapon and then resets their affinity to Unranked. This can only be used on max Rank Warframes, Companions and Weapons.

patchlogs.name: Update 30.9.0: Prime Resurgence
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Cedo magazine being stuck in your hand after reloading.

patchlogs.name: Nidus Prime & Plague Star: Hotfix 30.7.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Cedo having missing weapon sounds when using a Skin.

patchlogs.name: Update 30.7: Nidus Prime & Plague Star
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Cedo, Cyanex and Akarius causing a parried reaction (knock back) versus certain enemies.

patchlogs.name: Orphix Venom: Hotfix 29.6.8 + 29.6.8.1
patchlogs.changes: Minor improvements for the Cedo firing animations.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed missing Hecaton Shotgun Skin reload animation when equipped on the Cedo.

patchlogs.name: Update 29.6.0: Orphix Venom!
patchlogs.fixes:
Cedo Blueprint & Parts 
Launch a glaive that ricochets off surfaces in bursts of elemental damage, then perforate enemies with primary fire’s precision buck-shot. Damages increased with each Status Effect afflicting a target. Lavos will transmute a small portion of any ammo pickup to Shotgun ammo when wielding his signature Cedo.
Lavos the Transmuter emerges from the seething smoke, the forgotten master of a much-misunderstood art. Includes the Lavo Warframe, Cordatus Alternate Helmet, Transmutation Probe Decoration, Vitam Syandana, and Cedo Shotgun. Also includes 3-Day Affinity and Credit Boosters.
